summary: This is a recording of Taraweeh prayers (Ramadan evening prayers) at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The content consists primarily of Quranic recitation during the prayer, featuring multiple surahs including Al-Baqarah, Ar-Ra'd, Al-Furqan, Yaseen, Ar-Rahman, and Surah Al-Ikhlas. Interspersed between the main Quranic recitations is a brief sermon (khutbah) discussing the eloquence of divine silence in the Quran, touching on examples from Surah Al-Fatihah and Surah Al-Alaq. The prayers conclude with extensive du'as (supplications), including prayers for Muslim communities facing hardship in places like Gaza and Sudan.
suggested_title: Taraweeh Prayers with Quranic Recitation and Sermon on Divine Silence
